title: Argumentar
summary: Connect ideas: reasons, examples, and however.

teach.target: Le problema es que il pluve.
teach.roman: le problema es que il pluve
teach.english: The problem is that it's raining.

teach.target: Io ha fame, dunque io vole mangiar.
teach.roman: io ha fame dunque io vole mangiar
teach.english: I'm hungry, so I want to eat.
teach.note: dunque connects a reason to its result.

grammar.title: Reasons and results
grammar.body: **proque** (because) gives a reason; **dunque**/**ergo** (therefore, so) gives a result. Put them together and you can explain yourself: Io ha fame proque io non ha mangiate — dunque io va mangiar nunc.

teach.note: per = for/by (as in per favor); exemplo = example.

teach.target: Interlingua es facile. Le grammatica anglese, nonobstante, es difficile.
teach.roman: interlingua es facile le grammatica anglese nonobstante es difficile
teach.english: Interlingua is easy. English grammar, however, is difficult.

teach.target: Io ama le colores, per exemplo blau e verde.
teach.roman: io ama le colores per exemplo blau e verde
teach.english: I love colors, for example blue and green.

canDo: Connect ideas with however, therefore, and because
Explain a problem and a possible reason
